titleStmt.title: SII 23.93: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 93. (A.R. No. 93 of 1907.) Kalliḍaikkuṟichchi, Ambasamudram Taluk, Tirunelveli District Nāgēśvaram-Uḍaiyār temple—on the north wall of the central shrine

summary.p: This is a record of the 5+1st year of the same king (Sundara-Pāṇḍya) with the attribute ‘who was pleased to take the Chōḷa country’. It registers a gift of 6(1/4) achchu for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple, by one Āchchān Tikkaṉ a native of Mayilaikōḍu in Malai-maṇḍalam. The amount was deposited with the Śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple who agreed to burn the lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakkaravattikaḷ co
ṇāṭu koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya devaṟku yāṇ
ṭu 5- Etirāmāṇṭu muḷḷināṭṭu piramateyam śrīrājarājacatu
rvedimaṅkalattu teṉpiṭākai kallaṭai kuṟicciyil Uṭai
yār nilaiuṭaiya pāṇṭiya Īccuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyililc ci
vappirāmaṇarom Innāyaṉārukku malaimaṇṭalattu mayilaikoṭ
ṭu Āccāṉ tikkaṉ Iṉṉāyanārukku nitta cittamāka cantirātittavaṟ cel
vatāka vaitta tirununtāviḷak[ ku 1*] Ivviḷakkoṉṟukkum Ivaṉ cipaṇ
ṭārattil Oṭukkiṉa Accu 6(1/4) Ivvac cāṟekālum nāṅkaḷ kaikko
ṇṭu tirunontāviḷakku celuttuvatākavum Aṉṟāṭu kuṭaṅkoṭu ko
yil pukuvār celuttuvatākavum cammatittu Ivvaccu kaikkoṇṭu ka
llile veṭṭikkuṭuttom civappirāmaṇarom Ippaṭi Ivai caṭṭa
ṉ māṉatiīccuraṉāṉa virāparaṇapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Eccavarākaṉ Āṇpā
lāṉa kotukulapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Umaiāḷvāṉ Āviṉkaṉṟāṉa
niyāyaparipālapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu poṉṉampi veḷḷattāṅkiaāṉa ti
rucciṟṟampala paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu poṉṉampi Umaiāḷvāṉ Āyiratta
ḷipaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu caṭṭaṉ perumāḷ kāmarāca paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu ciṟiyac cevaka
ttevaṉāṉa nāṟpatteṇṇāyira paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 23.93 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
